CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Shop_Code_Upload__c), '线上', IF(Customer__r.SAP_Customer_Code__c == '0000507925' && ISBLANK(Shop_Code_Upload__c), '其他', IF(Shop_Code_Upload__c <= '1000', '分拣仓', IF(Shop_Code_Upload__c >= 'S88', '线上', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c, 3) == '988', '线上', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c, 2) == 'XP', '展会', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c, 2) == '99', '分拣仓', '')))))))
CustomField.label: Source
